reviews.review_title: Fix the AI and make practice mode
reviews.review_description: I believe those AI’s think volleyball as tag or something. They are the dumbest bots ever. When I disable the aim assist and score with a hard spike, the ball bounces to the wall and counts as a point. The game mechanism needs an arrangement as soon as possible; the ball goes over the Eiffel Tower when I simply receive a serve. Change the jumping mechanism like Gym Class. It sucks. I don’t understand why these developers think that they can add a multi-player mode after watching a Youtube tutorial. The daily challenge is a feature for gugugaga babies and is just so indifferent. There are only three maps: Beach(day), Beach(night), and Indoors, and I believe having about three more maps can satisfy players. The current maps are not bad (especially the beach) and have a lack on features like sounds. This is not that important but let players stay in a position. Don’t just let them play only the front rows. (How about the back row?) Devs, you need to work to get money. Fix the AI’s, add practice mode, add a mechanism to receive a ball, add more maps, just delete or enable multi-player mode as soon as possible, fix bugs, go watch real volleyball games, and learn basic physics. I will change my rate only if you stop eating chips next to your television.

I bought this game and thoroughly enjoyed it tbh the best volleyball game I’ve played but having a problem when trying to spike and it doesn’t spike might be a skill issue but the game needs a lot more variety and different maps it’s decent
Add Mixed Reality and my life is yours

reviews.review_title: I lile it but it need to be better
reviews.review_description: The game is pretty fun to play but the online version has no one to play and there are only three maps it could be more. So my final decision is 4 stars because the online version is bad and the maps
i love the game but... why does online just not work?
Just need to work on serving power an let the players hit with more power during serves and also allow players to play with people they don’t have added
It’s the vr volleyball game it’s easy to play but the pro AI are not that good and you can move anywhere but if you miss your serve and it goes to the AI they will touch the ball to save it

reviews.review_title: Kinda awful tbh, could be good with work
reviews.review_description: Read all of the “excellent reviews” made by “real people” bought it only to be heavily disappointed and out of $15, you can’t move any where but up and down with an ok jump feature, the physics are way off half the time, hitting is awful, no point in trying to set it bc it 100% won’t go where you want it, this could be so sick but rn just save the $15 for a quick gas station handy or something, anything but this
game is fun don’t get me wrong, but there is not a single other human in the game.

I always want to be able to play volleyball all the time, but I don’t have a court or place to go, this is soo much fun, and it’s really satisfying to slam a volleyball on the other court 100% best game on VR 

P.S. I’ve had this game for a couple months, and never get bored of it, it’s a good game.
would rate it -10 stars if i could this game is so bad bro

reviews.review_title: Not worth the price but fun
reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game to play but there is a lot of little problems and things that can be better. It’s different not worth $15 but overall if your bored it’s fun for a little
Way better than volleggball

reviews.review_description:
HELP ME I HAVE JUMP ON INSTANT AND MOVMRNT ON AND I CAN JUMP NO MATER WHAT BUTTON IT WONT JUMP!
Update: 
You push the trigger at the same time… but no one’s ever online and I don’t know how to join discord.

reviews.review_title: Needs 8 player count instead of just 4
reviews.review_description: I have several family and friends with headsets. We tried to play 3v3, but only 4 real players could enter the game at a time. The other players were bots. Real players should be able to take the place of bots. Great game though!

If I’m being fully honest, as soon as I saw this game on my instagram feed I was rummaging around looking for the name. Once I found the game I immediately bought it. I was just so exited to play volleyball ball in vr, and for this price; it’s definitely worth it. I just wish it had some type of tutorial, because when I started I had no clue how to play. But after a few matches I adjusted the settings to make it so that I move with my joystick and so that I can jump with my triggers(I have a very small room).I’m gonna be honest; I HATE the manual jump control, and I really hope it’s a work in progress, because pressing BOTH triggers to jump is horribly uncomfortable for me. But overall a great game

This game is literally my favorite vr game. I play volleyball irl and this game is perfect practice, I stayed up all night playing. TIP I didn’t know that if you go to settings there are a bunch of things to change the game so make sure you check settings. Def worth 15$ if you’re thinking abt buying it then trust me it’s worth it. All the other reviews saying “it’s pretty mid” are just people with different opinions. Me speaking as someone who play volleyball competitively this game is fire.
The game is really fun especially when you play volleyball in real life. But it just needs multiplayer working than it would be a total 5 star rating. So please, make multiplayer start working.

My precious review was 5 stars but after playing for a while I’ve noticed a lot of issues. First, the bots play the ball in stupid ways like sending the ball over on the first touch or just passing into the net even on pro level. If the boys were able to do stuff like jump set or hit from back row that would improve the game drastically. Also, the content is lacking. There is only three maps (indoor, beach day, beach night) which are relatively good, yet it’s still lacking. Adding more maps like a grass map or even a sky island map would be very interesting. Adding cosmetics and a shop would be cool as well, like doing quests could get you coins to buy cosmetics for your avatar. Also mentioned in another person review, you should allow players to stay at a designated position like staying in back row only instead of front row. In addition you should also update the multiplayer system to be more efficient. The game is still pretty fun tho despite not receiving updates much and new content.
This game is so much fun and you can either play the front or all positions
Everything in the game is good except multiplayer

reviews.review_title: Don’t let the reviews deter you
reviews.review_description: This is a fun game. It’s even better if you have a large play area. It’s really exciting to be able to jump and hit the ball. This is one of many of my “warmup” games before my boxing workout. It helps me loosen up a bit. Please don’t let a couple of “bad” reviews deter you from buying such an awesome game.
I can’t play online I will change my regionals it still wouldn’t work it says subscribe to my discord something like that is anyone like this ?? If someone knows how to fix it can you reply

reviews.review_title: Are you hesitant to get this game
reviews.review_description: Well don’t be this is fun they have fixed most of the problems have better movement and control it still needs work but is the best vr volleyball game out there so this is definitely a have to get if you love volleyball like me

reviews.review_title: I love the game but there is a problem.
reviews.review_description:
I love playing solo with the bot and I found the game overall good but I can't play online .
It says no server found join our discord so I searched for one but there is none.

This is a very fun game to play. I like that one have te option to move and jump on your own, or use the assistance of the controls. 
Like many others, I wish you could change your avatar, and I would love if after a game, one could see the replay of the best moments on fixed camera angles povs to save them.
Another thing I suggest is that you can select the size of the pitch, and the amount of players per team.

I like this game a lot! Although it is still in testing, this is really fun! One thing I wish they would add is some sort of tutorial, but the game is pretty easy to understand. You wont regret buying this!
I’m having a lot of fun but I can’t connect with any other people

I would say this game is great and it really is. But the multiplayer is kind of disappointing as it will take forever to get in a lobby or get people in your lobby so you’re usually stuck playing bots.

I really like the game it is fun and can be addictive sometimes but there isn’t that many player that are online playing the game so it can be a bit boring at some points would love to see more people on it.
I love this game because it puts one of my favourite sports in a vr game and you can play with real people!
This Game is very Easy To understand and very fun to Play but there are to less Player who Play it online Thais a Bit sad but very good

This game has lots of potential to it. It has a great impact to the vr community but yet there isn’t that much to do. Something’s I want to be added in this game is 1: 1v1 mode 
2: accessories and cosmetics 
3: 2v2 and other vs.
But this game has lots of potential so you will never know what it has in store for us.

This game is amazing for being the only volleyball game on quest that I have seen it is very fun with friends and very easy to get the hang of the levels are very well made and have great detail to them. THIS GAME IS TOO GOOD worth the money
Love the game, but I wish you could change your avatar and play with other random people, not just friends.
Needs multiplayer

GREAT GAME!! I’ve made some tiktoks on this game (StingVR)because RainsyVR gave me a key to the game and I’m so glad he did because this game is amazing!!

Keep it up!
Great game highly recommend it
I’m love volleyball in real life and now in the vr I can hopefully get better at it and I love to serve the ball
I’ve always loved Volleyball, and this game is so much fun. I could okay this all day. And I’m just playing with bots. I haven’t had any luck finding online games
